zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen II Duke of Bavaria於1313年12月22日出生在德國貝也明陳時，他的父親Ludwig IV von Bayern31歲，母親Beatrix von Silesia23歲。他於1328年6月27日與Elisabeth de Sicile在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 明陳結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1375年5月19日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特享年61歲，埋葬在德國貝也明陳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen II Duke of Bavaria于1313年12月22日出生在德国貝也明陳时，他的父亲Ludwig IV von Bayern31岁，母亲Beatrix von Silesia23岁。他于1328年6月27日与Elisabeth de Sicile在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 明陳结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1375年5月19日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特享年61岁，埋葬在德国貝也明陳。

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen II Duke of Bavaria was born on 22 December 1313, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Ludwig IV von Bayern, was 31 and his mother, Beatrix von Silesia, was 23. He married Elisabeth de Sicile on 27 June 1328, in München, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 19 May 1375, in Landshut, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 61, and was buried in Munich, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.Puch, Fürstenfeldbruck, Bavaria, Germany: Puch, Fürstenfeldbruck, Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen II Duke of Bavaria est né le 22 décembre 1313, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig IV von Bayern, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Silesia, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth de Sicile le 27 juin 1328, à Landkreis München, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1375, à Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à München, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.Puch, Fürstenfeldbruck, Bavaria, Germany: Puch, Fürstenfeldbruck, Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen II Duke of Bavaria am 22. Dezember 1313 in München, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig IV von Bayern 31 und seine Mutter Beatrix von Silesia 23. Er hat am 27. Juni 1328 in Landkreis München, Bayern, Deutschland Elisabeth de Sicile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 19. Mai 1375 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in München, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen II Duke of Bavaria è nato il il 22 dicembre 1313 nel München, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Ludwig IV von Bayern, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix von Silesia, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth de Sicile il 27 giugno 1328, nel Landkreis München, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 19 maggio 1375, nel Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a München, Bayern, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen II Duke of Bavaria(이)가 1313년 12월 22일 독일 베이른 u천에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig IV von Bayern(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix von Silesia(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1328년 6월 27일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 u천에서 Elisabeth de Sicile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1375년 5월 19일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 랜드슈트에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 u천에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen II Duke of Bavaria nasceu em 22 de dezembro de 1313, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig IV von Bayern, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix von Silesia, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth de Sicile em 27 de junho de 1328, em Landkreis München, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1375, em Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemanha, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em München, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen II Duke of Bavaria родился 22 декабря 1313 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Ludwig IV von Bayern было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Silesia, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth de Sicile 27 июня 1328 г. в местности ландкрис мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 19 мая 1375 г. в местности ландкрис ландшут, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen II Duke of Bavaria nació el 22 de diciembre de 1313, en München, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Ludwig IV von Bayern, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrix von Silesia, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elisabeth de Sicile el 27 de junio de 1328, en Landkreis München, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1375, en Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en München, Bayern, Alemania.
